hero.badge: A new era in subscription control
hero.subtitle: Detect price hikes, expiring deals, and services no longer worth it. All in one place.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I use Killer Control for free?
faq.a1: Yes, Killer Control offers a free plan that lets you manage up to 5 subscriptions and receive basic alerts. If you need more, our Premium plans unlock advanced features.
faq.q2: What does the Premium plan include?
faq.a2: The Premium plan includes unlimited subscriptions, automatic price increase detection, deep spending analysis, and personalized savings suggestions.
faq.a3: Absolutely. There are no lock-in contracts or hidden commitments. You can cancel your account at any time from your profile.
faq.q4: Do I need a card to get started?
faq.a4: No. You can sign up and use the free plan without entering any payment details.
faq.a5: Our algorithm analyzes your spending patterns and compares your service prices with market alternatives to suggest smart switches.
